title: UK Signs [MTR 3/4]
description: Adds UK signs and departure boards to the MTR mod.
body:
**Requires Joban Client mod >2.0.0 for the departure boards to work.**

![Station hall with departure boards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rtIySn3x/images/7db3e6b011a2041b282c1c5a7acc8d64276cdbdf.png)
![A selection of available signs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rtIySn3x/images/b03fb4e3f7191cb86076adc852a3c78fb8799fde.png)

# UK Signs
Adds UK style train station signs, British Rail logo, and departure boards to the MTR mod.
For instructions on how to use the British Rail logo, as well as for the departure boards, please see the wiki: https://github.com/ProbablyIdiot/UK-Signs/wiki


## Credits:

@british2 - Images and fonts

@bitone - British Rail 3D model

@probablyidiot - Coding, distribution and general upkeep


Please open an issue on the Github for bug reports, issues and feature requests.
